base_prompt: Write in a professional technical report style. Use only the retrieved context. Do not invent facts. Keep the output clear, structured, and suitable for a proof-of-concept project report.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.instruction: Introduce the topic and explain its background.

sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.instruction: Summarize the purpose and value of the Smart Classroom AI document generator.

sections.title: System Architecture
sections.instruction: Explain the main components and how they work together.

subsections.title: Core Modules
subsections.instruction: Describe ingestion, retrieval, prompt building, generation, and output rendering.

sections.title: Retrieval and Citation Strategy
sections.instruction: Explain how retrieved chunks are used and how citations support traceability.

sections.title: Evaluation Metrics
sections.instruction: List and explain the evaluation metrics used to judge the system.

sections.title: Risks and Future Scope
sections.instruction: Discuss risks, limitations, deployment concerns, and possible future improvements.
